title: Hospitality and Diotrephes
summary_text: Elder to beloved Gaius—pray prosper health soul—joy brethren testify truth—strangers entertained—send forth worthily of God—Diotrephes loves preeminence refuses—do not imitate evil good.
key_points: The elder to the beloved Gaius, whom I love in truth.
I pray that you may prosper in all things and be healthy, even as your soul prospers.
For they went out for the sake of the Name.
We therefore ought to receive such, that we may be fellow workers for the truth.
Don’t imitate what is evil, but that which is good.
evidence_phrases: they went out for the sake of the Name
